creator: bsdport@ddm.wox.org
text:
> Does the maintainer approve?

I wasn't CCed on this so I didn't see the question until I went to
upgrade the port again and looked for outstanding PRs.

For the record I meant to imply in my original response that the patch
was good and could have been applied.  Sorry for missing the question.
(And sorry and for my bad attitude in the start of my previous reply.)

But now this PR should be closed without applying the patch.  The new
PR 32091 can be applied instead to update the doxygen port directly
from 1.2.11 -> 1.2.12.

-- 
Dave Chapeskie
